hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *holsters.html|*handguns.html|*rifles.html|*shotguns.html|*optics.html|*ammunition.html|*ar-parts.html|*magazines.html|*cleaning.html|*gun-safes.html|*manual-products.json|*static-products.json|*search-index.json|*fetch-eurooptic.js) powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File 'C:\Users\jmali\OneDrive\Ideal Armory\New Deployment\tools\audit.ps1' -ChangedFile "$FILE" 2>&1;; esac; true
